# ADR 003: backstage-style filename

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-06

## Context

Filename convention `adr003-backstage-style.md` — letters glued directly to digits, no separator between them. Found running duckadrift's R5 calibration corpus against backstage.

## Decision

Recognize this as ADR number 3.

## Consequences

None — fixture file for filename-convention parsing, not a Tier 0 check.
